notes: Financial Account HIGH: Insurance amount on live account. Mandatory in Caribbean jurisdictions.
Financial Account HIGH: FSC standard balance field is preferred.
Collateral HIGH: Amount financed against collateral.
Collateral HIGH: Guarantee amount on collateral.
PIT MEDIUM: Monthly residual income per borrower on Party Involved in Transaction.
Account HIGH: FSC standard net worth field — direct match
Loan Package MEDIUM: Overdraft accounts aggregated at loan package level.
Financial Account HIGH: Direct match
Account HIGH: ⚠️ SF field has typo: Real_State__c (not Real_Estate__c). Confirm API name in your org.
Financial Account HIGH: Secured portion of the loan.
Account HIGH: Stocks field in XML maps to combined stocks+bonds field in SF.
Loan MEDIUM: "Disbursed" = "posted" in Jack Henry / core banking parlance.
Account HIGH: Direct name match
Loan Package MEDIUM: BOSL = Bank of Saint Lucia = "with us". Bank-specific terminology.
Loan Package MEDIUM: "Current balance" = total package debt in BOSL context.
Loan MEDIUM: Plural-to-singular rename.
Loan Package MEDIUM: "Existing debt" = "current balance of existing debt".
Collateral MEDIUM: FORCE_XVALUE = forced sale cross value (~60-80% of market value).
PIT MEDIUM: HP = Hire Purchase — Caribbean term for installment lending (vehicles, equipment).
Loan HIGH: Direct match
Account HIGH: Direct match
Account HIGH: Attorney reference code.
Financial Account HIGH: Branch code on live account — FSC standard.
Loan HIGH: Currency of loan. XCD (EC Dollar) or USD common in Caribbean.
Loan HIGH: Type of disbursement.
Financial Account HIGH: General Ledger code.
Loan HIGH: GL-based loan type code.
Loan HIGH: Variable rate code. Paired with PERC_LOAN_VARIABLE_RATE.
Account HIGH: ⚠️ Person Account field (__pc). Banking Sector classification for ECCB reporting.
Loan HIGH: Product classification code.
Financial Account HIGH: Account status picklist. Requires value translation matrix.
Loan HIGH: Sale type code.
Loan HIGH: Watchlist monitoring category.
Loan MEDIUM: AUS = Automated Underwriting System error message from core banking.
Loan Package MEDIUM: Application date = package creation date. Standard SF field (set on record creation).
FA / Loan HIGH: Same field name exists on both Loan and Financial Account.
Loan HIGH: Boarding = posting to core banking system (Jack Henry). Critical lifecycle marker.
Loan HIGH: Date funds were disbursed.
Loan HIGH: Date interest begins accruing.
Account HIGH: Next scheduled review date — FSC standard.
Financial Account HIGH: Account open date — FSC standard.
Loan HIGH: Date first payment is due.
Loan MEDIUM: "Scheduled closing" = "expected disbursement" — confirm business meaning.
PIT HIGH: ⚠️ Lookup to Account. XML has text name — name-to-ID resolution required.
Collateral HIGH: ⚠️ Contact lookup — name-to-ID resolution required.
Loan Package HIGH: ⚠️ User lookup — name-to-ID resolution required.
Account HIGH: ⚠️ Person Account field only (__pc). Not available on business accounts.
Loan Package HIGH: ⚠️ User lookup — name-to-ID resolution required.
Loan HIGH: Default / penalty interest rate.
PIT HIGH: DI = Debt to Income ratio per borrower.
FEE HIGH: Fee expressed as a percentage.
Loan HIGH: Variable rate component. Paired with CODE_LOAN_VARIABLE_RATE.
PIT HIGH: Residual income as percentage per borrower.
Account HIGH: ⚠️ Person Account field. Note: SF field name has intentional typo "Dilligence". ⚠️ Y/N → boolean transform required.
Account HIGH: FATCA maps to CRS terminology in SF. ⚠️ XML Y/N string → SF true/false boolean transform required.
Loan LOW: ⚠️ Unusual pattern: boolean source → text target. Confirm intended mapping; may need special handling.
Account HIGH: ⚠️ Person Account field. Autopay / standing order instruction. Y/N → boolean transform required.
Account HIGH: ⚠️ Person Account field. 183-day substantial presence test for FATCA compliance. Y/N → boolean transform required.
